title: Workforce
description: A roster binding each topology role to an agent adapter and its launch-time tuning. See docs/workforce-schema.md for the prose contract.

name.description: Workforce identifier; matches the file name (workforces/<name>.json) and the --workforce flag.

members.description: One entry per role the active topology spawns.

role.description: Topology role this member runs (must match a working-stage role in the active topology).

params.description: Launch-time tuning bag. The adapter translates the keys it understands into CLI flags and ignores the rest, so extra keys are permitted (and forwarded-or-dropped per adapter).

model.description: Model id passed to the adapter's CLI (e.g. claude-opus-4-8). claude-code → --model; codex → --model. Validated by the CLI at launch, not here.

effort.description: Reasoning effort. claude-code → --effort (low|medium|high|xhigh|max); codex → -c model_reasoning_effort=<effort> (minimal|low|medium|high). The accepted set is adapter-specific, so this is a free string validated by the CLI at launch, not by the schema.
